title: When Form is used, the Creator is set to who created the Form
excerpt:
Not sure if anyone else has has this issue. 
I created a Form and whenever an Item is added via the Form; the Creator is set as me?

posts.author: lisy (Lisy Kane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Not sure if anyone else has has this issue.

I created a Form and whenever an Item is added via the Form; the Creator is set as me?

posts.author: aspilm (Lipsa)
posts.cookedHtml: You will need to add the other colleagues as board members and set automation to auto assign as per user who is logged in.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @lisy @aspilm

Nachliel from Easyapps here

  • You can know who submitted a form by not making form responses anonyms and adding the Creation Log column to your board.
  • Notice - if the submitter of the form is not a board member, the creator of the form will be marked as the submitter.
  • You can assign the submitter to that item using this automation (no need for the Creation Log field):

assign owner automation1009×649 18.4 KB

Regardless, if you are interested in creating styled forms that better match your brand and embed perfectly in you web page you can check out our monday.com app Easyform and our extensive documentation site.

You can set up a free demo here or contact us at support@easyappshq.com.

I hope this helps

Nachliel
